name: MiniMax
_comment: OWN PRODUCT — tuned for RECALL. Bare 'MiniMax' is included deliberately: sampled live 2026-07-20, it returned 20/20 on-topic AI hits, and it catches genuine demo evidence ('opened MiniMax Hub, selected Story to Video Generator') that quoted product names miss entirely. 'Hailuo' likewise runs heavy in JP/CN video-gen content, often written 'Minimax Hailuo 2'. RISK: bare 'MiniMax' also matches the game-theory algorithm (minimax theorem/regret, alpha-beta). It is clean today only because the launch news cycle dominates the term. Re-sample when the cycle cools; if algorithm noise starts eating MAX_TWEETS_PER_CYCLE, drop the bare term and keep the quoted ones.
_kol_source: seed_kols expanded 2026-07-21 via tools/build_kol_list.py: original curated set + accounts followed by >=6 of 8 seed lab/researcher accounts (non-org, see kol-ranked.md for full 329). Widen from kol-ranked.md as polling budget allows.

name: Kimi (competitor)
_comment: COMPETITOR. crystalsssup is an OFFICIAL account, not a KOL — her bio reads '@Kimi_Moonshot Staff'. Filing her under seed_kols would score first-party Kimi marketing as independent expert_review evidence and inflate the competitor's perceived third-party validation. Bare 'K3' is excluded: sampled live it returned a mobile-crusher auction listing alongside the model hits, and 'Kimi K3' loses nothing since the model is not discussed without the brand.

name: GLM / Z.ai (competitor)
_comment: COMPETITOR. Bare 'GLM' is excluded — it is the standard abbreviation for Generalized Linear Model. It sampled clean today only because GLM-5.2 just launched; unlike MiniMax there is no recall argument for the bare term, since GLM releases are effectively always version-qualified in practice. Version-numbered keywords also survive the next release: add GLM-5.3/5.5 when they ship.
